validation.postprocess_alignment: Applied deterministic checks for endpoint names, evidence paths, and safety wording
validation.auth_boundary: Appointment APIs require an authenticated demo session
validation.conflict_recalculation: Conflict flags are recalculated after appointment creation and staff review
validation.submission_validation: scripts/validate_submission.py checks structure, DeepSeek metadata, APIFREE metadata, English-only text, and possible API key leakage
validation.docker_deployment: Dockerfile, GitHub Actions Docker build/smoke test, and Render Docker runtime are generated
